message.content:
@startuml
title Discovery

actor Client

box " " #white
participant "→ Alias" as Alias
end box

Client -> Alias : HEAD
Alias --> Client : 307 Temporary Redirect / 308 Permanent Redirect

note left of Client #lightgreen
**Header**    **Value**
Profile    <http://level3.rest/profiles/alias>,
              <target-profile>
Allow       //target's Allow values//
Location  //target URL//
end note

@enduml
